russia.name: Russia
russia.subtitle: Indicative averages (Moscow higher; gross / month unless stated)

seo.title: Russia — WiggMap
seo.description: Russia living snapshot: salaries, rent, utilities, taxes, gasoline, immigration, quality of life — WiggMap.

min_wage.hint: minimum wage (MROT) = 27,093 RUB/month from 01-01-2026; FX implied ~77.4 RUB/$ (see gas price source)

avg_salary.hint: avg monthly wage ~98,193 RUB (Nov 2025); FX implied ~77.4 RUB/$ (see gas price source)

doctor_salary.hint: indicative hospital physician total comp; varies widely by region/specialty

rent_studio.hint: national indicative ≈ 1BR outside center 28,641 RUB (cost-of-living datasets); Moscow much higher

electricity.hint: utilities proxy scaled down to studio; electricity-heavy share

mobile.hint: typical mid-range mobile plan; varies by operator/promos

beer.hint: bar draft beer indicative; groceries cheaper

gas.hint: fuel price: 67.32 RUB/L ≈ $0.87/L (GlobalPetrolPrices); implies FX ~77.4 RUB/$

vat.hint: standard VAT raised from 20% to 22% starting 2026

income_tax.hint: personal income tax uses multiple rates (commonly cited 13% base; higher bands exist)

smallbiz.hint: effective small business burden (USN 6% turnover or 15% profit + social contributions) — profile dependent

iphone.hint: indicative import/grey-market pricing; can vary strongly due to availability

samsung.hint: indicative flagship pricing; varies by model/availability

immigration.hint: work permit / residency possible but can be complex; geopolitics affect mobility

sun.hint: climate average; huge variation by region

health.hint: public healthcare + private clinics; quality varies by city

insurance.hint: example private basic coverage in major cities

religion_muslim.hint: indicative minority share; higher in some regions

turkey.name: Turkey
turkey.subtitle: Indicative averages (Istanbul higher; gross / month unless stated)

seo.title: Turkey — WiggMap
seo.description: Turkey living snapshot: salaries, rent, utilities, taxes, gasoline, immigration, quality of life — WiggMap.

min_wage.hint: 2026 gross minimum wage ≈ 33,030 TRY/month; FX implied ~43.6 TRY/$ (from gas price source)

avg_salary.hint: avg monthly wage 39,253 TRY (2024); FX implied ~43.6 TRY/$

doctor_salary.hint: indicative physician compensation; varies by public/private and specialty

rent_studio.hint: Istanbul reference: 1BR outside center 28,830 TRY (cost-of-living datasets); studio slightly lower; national lower

electricity.hint: utilities proxy; depends on season and housing

water.hint: utilities proxy; water share smaller vs electricity/heating

mobile.hint: mid-range mobile plan indicative; promos vary

beer.hint: bar price indicative; alcohol taxes create variance

gas.hint: fuel price: 55.43 TRY/L ≈ $1.27/L (GlobalPetrolPrices); implies FX ~43.6 TRY/$

smallbiz.hint: effective small business burden varies heavily (tax + social security + regime)

immigration.hint: residency options exist; work permits depend on employer/requirements

electricity.hint: typical apartment monthly electricity; higher in summer (AC)

beer.hint: bar draft beer indicative; Tel Aviv higher

income_tax.hint: progressive PIT; additional surtaxes may apply

smallbiz.hint: effective burden depends on structure + national insurance

iphone.hint: indicative local retail pricing; can vary

immigration.hint: case-dependent; work visas limited; Return policy for eligible profiles

health.hint: universal coverage via health funds + private add-ons

religion_other.hint: includes Jewish majority + Druze/other/none (schema has no jewish field)

palestine.name: Palestine
palestine.subtitle: Indicative averages (West Bank vs Gaza differ; gross / month unless stated)

seo.title: Palestine — WiggMap
seo.description: Palestine living snapshot: salaries, rent, utilities, taxes, gasoline, immigration, quality of life — WiggMap.

avg_salary.hint: overall average varies heavily by area; indicative national blended estimate

doctor_salary.hint: indicative physician comp; depends on public/NGO/private and location

rent_studio.hint: rent varies sharply; Ramallah higher; indicative estimate

electricity.hint: utilities proxy scaled down to studio; electricity-heavy share

beer.hint: varies strongly; Ramallah draft beer ~₪15 (cost-of-living datasets)

gas.hint: often follows Israeli pricing dynamics; proxy value when no robust national series

health.hint: public/NGO/private mix; access varies sharply by area

crime.hint: indicative; varies by location and period
